render_strategy.source:
{
  args: {
    ...defaultArgs,
    withBackToTop: true
  },
  render: args => <Footer>
      <Footer.Top {...args.withBackToTop && {
      backToTop: <Button label="Back to top" variant={ButtonVariant.TERTIARY} icon={IconName.ARROW_UPWARD} iconPosition={IconPosition.END} onClick={() => console.log({
        ...args
      })} inverse />
    }} brandLogo={{
      src: sanofiLogoInverse,
      alt: "sanofi_logo",
      title: "Sanofi"
    }} additionalInformation="This is a placeholder for additional informations." socialLinks={socialLinks}>
        <FooterColumn>
          <FooterTitleLink href="#">Category 1</FooterTitleLink>
          <LinksExample />
        </FooterColumn>
        <FooterColumn>
          <FooterTitleLink>Category 2</FooterTitleLink>
          <LinksExample />
        </FooterColumn>
        <FooterColumn>
          <FooterTitleLink href="#">Category 3</FooterTitleLink>
          <LinksExample />
        </FooterColumn>
        <FooterColumn>
          <FooterTitleLink>Category 4</FooterTitleLink>
          <LinksExample />
        </FooterColumn>
      </Footer.Top>
      <Footer.Bottom legalMention={legalMention}>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Site Map
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Legal Notice
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Cookies Policy
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Privacy & Data Protection
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Accessibility
        </FooterBottomLink>
      </Footer.Bottom>
    </Footer>
}
